{{Quote|It's clear where home is now.|Unga Torr|<ref name="HNN45">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|45|news/13228_2.html|Mass Aqualish Exodus Expected}}</ref>}}
'''Unga Torr''' was an [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] clerk at the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] shortly before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He left [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] for his homeworld of [[Ando/Legends|Ando]] after its secession from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

*{{HoloNetNewsWeb|45|news/13228_2.html|Mass Aqualish Exodus Expected}} {{1st}}
